Sponsors of the Molecular Sciences Institute

As of June 2000, support for the Molecular Sciences Institute is provided by:

Aventis

Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency

Lynx Therapeutics

National Human Genome Research Institute

National Institute of General Medical Sciences

Office of Naval Research

Philip Morris Management Corporation

Sponsorship Information

Please contact Lauren Ha, lha@molsci.org or (510) 647-0696, if you would like to learn more about sponsoring the Institute and its mission or would like to arrange a visit.
